name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5BB142, Miu Miu new bowling bag, official flagship, this year's absolute hit🔥 style, top-grade imported calfskin, Miu Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo echoes the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with zip pocket, many celebrities and influencers' same style, size 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging,
